metadata.title: Role Crosswalk — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2
metadata.scope: Full semantic mapping between Heritage Gold role model (legacy LAWIM) and current LAWIM_V2 role system.

legend.NORMALIZED_MATCH: Concept exists with different naming/structuring — trivial mapping
legend.ONE_TO_MANY: One legacy concept maps to multiple current concepts
legend.MANY_TO_ONE: Multiple legacy concepts map to one current concept
legend.PARTIAL_MATCH: Concept partially exists but significant semantic differences remain
legend.EXTENSION_REQUIRED: Concept has no equivalent — new implementation needed
legend.CONFLICT: Legacy and current concepts contradict — resolution needed
legend.HUMAN_DECISION_REQUIRED: Cannot be resolved automatically — requires human judgment

role_families.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold fuses buyer+tenant+investor under one family; LAWIM_V2 uses business profiles for differentiation
role_families.data_migration_impact: Map all demandeur-family users to role="user"; retain original role in metadata for traceability
role_families.runtime_impact: None — user role exists and handles all demandeur functions
role_families.qualification_impact: Business profile drives qualification; legacy demandeur maps to multiple V2 profiles
role_families.search_impact: Same search scope for all demandeur-type users
role_families.matching_impact: Matching logic must consider business_profile not just role
role_families.CRM_impact: CRM treats all demandeur as "user" — loss of demandeur-specific context
role_families.recommended_resolution: Implement business_profile on User model; migrate legacy role as fallback

role_families.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold treats seller as contextual role of owner; LAWIM_V2 has dedicated "owner" profile
role_families.data_migration_impact: Map proprietaire users to role="user" + business_profile="owner"
role_families.qualification_impact: Qualification forms must differentiate sell vs. own intent
role_families.CRM_impact: CRM must map proprietaire → owner profile
role_families.recommended_resolution: Use business_profile="owner" for all legacy proprietaire users

role_families.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold agent=broker; V2 has "real_estate_agent" profile and also "agent" profile (LAWIM internal)
role_families.data_migration_impact: Map agent-family users to role="operator" + business_profile="real_estate_agent"
role_families.runtime_impact: Operator role grants elevated permissions; verify legacy agent permissions match
role_families.qualification_impact: Agent qualification workflows are preserved via business_profile
role_families.security_impact: Operator role has moderate privilege — acceptable for agent functions
role_families.recommended_resolution: Map to operator role with real_estate_agent business profile

role_families.current_concept: official_role="operator" or "manager"; agency hierarchy not modeled
role_families.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold has 3 agency roles with hierarchy; V2 has flat operator/manager with no agency-responsible distinction
role_families.data_migration_impact: Requires new agency role field or Organization-level role assignment
role_families.runtime_impact: Current User.organizationId exists but no agency-specific role; migration must assign a default
role_families.qualification_impact: App-level role checks (isAdmin, isOperator) need extension for agency-level authorization
role_families.matching_impact: Agency hierarchy affects lead routing — currently broken
role_families.CRM_impact: CRM lacks agency role field; critical for agency management
role_families.security_impact: Agency roles control access to agency resources; gap is a security concern
role_families.recommended_resolution: Add agency_role field to User or Organization membership model

role_families.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold Supervisor includes mediation, counseling, operational oversight — V2 "manager" is generic
role_families.data_migration_impact: Map to role="manager"; supervision-specific functions need workflow-layer mapping
role_families.qualification_impact: Manager role needs mediation/supervision permissions added
role_families.search_impact: Supervisors need cross-entity visibility; verify manager role provides this
role_families.matching_impact: Supervisor overriding of matches may be needed
role_families.security_impact: Manager role has elevated privilege; acceptable
role_families.recommended_resolution: Extend manager role with supervision capabilities

role_families.semantic_differences: Direct match; V2 admin covers both administrateur and administrateur_principal

role_hierarchy.semantic_differences: Level-1 base role maps directly to lowest user tier
Level-2 inherits from demandeur and adds ownership capabilities
role_hierarchy.data_migration_impact: Map to role="user" with owner profile
role_hierarchy.security_impact: Same as user; ownership is profile, not privilege

role_hierarchy.semantic_differences: Level-3 agent inherits from propriétaire and adds professional capabilities
role_hierarchy.runtime_impact: Operator role has elevated system access — audit required
role_hierarchy.recommended_resolution: Role escalation from user to operator needs approval

role_hierarchy.current_concept: Organization model exists; no agency-level role
role_hierarchy.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold "agence" is a role level; V2 has Organization entity but no "agency" user role
role_hierarchy.data_migration_impact: Organization entity can be used but agency-specific role field on User is missing
role_hierarchy.runtime_impact: No runtime representation for agency role on User
role_hierarchy.search_impact: Agency portfolio views depend on organization association
role_hierarchy.matching_impact: Lead routing to agency not implemented
role_hierarchy.recommended_resolution: Add agency_role: "responsible" | "admin" | "agent" | "assistant" field to User model for agency context

role_hierarchy.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold assistant is an agency-support role below manager; V2 has no assistant-specific role
role_hierarchy.data_migration_impact: Map to role="operator" with business_profile or agency_role distinction
role_hierarchy.runtime_impact: May over-privilege assistants who had fewer permissions in legacy
role_hierarchy.security_impact: Operator may grant more access than assistant should have
role_hierarchy.recommended_resolution: Consider adding "assistant" to agency_role enum OR scope permissions by organization

role_hierarchy.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold vice_master is sub-admin supervisor; V2 manager is generic
role_hierarchy.runtime_impact: Some vice_master permissions may exceed manager capabilities
role_hierarchy.security_impact: Manager privilege is elevated; acceptable for vice_master functions
role_hierarchy.recommended_resolution: Extend manager if specific vice_master permissions are needed

role_hierarchy.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold master is top internal role (below admin); V2 admin combines both

permission_levels.current_concept: Implicit read access via role; no explicit permission system
permission_levels.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold has explicit 4-tier permission model; V2 permissions are implicit per role
permission_levels.data_migration_impact: No data migration needed — permissions are behavioral, not stored
permission_levels.runtime_impact: All users have read access; no explicit permission check required
permission_levels.security_impact: Read access is unrestricted for authenticated users
permission_levels.recommended_resolution: Implement explicit permission system if role-based access control needs fine-tuning

permission_levels.current_concept: Implicit create access; operator+ can create listings, user can create searches
permission_levels.semantic_differences: V2 creation rights are role-dependent but not formally modeled; Heritage Gold ties creation to specific role families
permission_levels.runtime_impact: Creation permission checks are hardcoded per feature
permission_levels.security_impact: Creation rights differ by role implicitly
permission_levels.recommended_resolution: Formalize Create permission level for each role

permission_levels.current_concept: Implicit edit access; users edit own, operators edit managed, admin edits all
permission_levels.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold ties Edit to items under responsibility; V2 has no formal "items under responsibility" concept
permission_levels.runtime_impact: Edit access granted by ownership or organization scope
permission_levels.search_impact: Edit own listings; agents edit managed listings
permission_levels.security_impact: Edit scoping is implicit and may be inconsistent
permission_levels.recommended_resolution: Formalize Edit permission scope (own vs. managed vs. all)

permission_levels.current_concept: No explicit approval level or workflow in V2
permission_levels.semantic_differences: Heritage Gold requires approval for agency creation, listing validation, etc.; V2 has no approval workflow
permission_levels.runtime_impact: New approval workflow engine needed for listing validation, agency creation, professional verification
permission_levels.recommended_resolution: Implement Approval permission level and workflow engine for admin/manager roles

trust_levels.semantic_differences: No equivalent trust or verification level in V2
trust_levels.data_migration_impact: New User field(s) required: trust_level, verification_status
trust_levels.runtime_impact: Trust checks not performed; all users treated equally
trust_levels.security_impact: No verification gates for sensitive operations
trust_levels.recommended_resolution: Add trust_level field to User model with 6 levels matching Gold spec

trust_levels.current_concept: Not implemented (phone exists but no verification flag)
trust_levels.semantic_differences: Gold marks phone_verified as explicit trust step; V2 has phoneE164 but no verified flag
trust_levels.qualification_impact: Phone verification may unlock certain features
trust_levels.recommended_resolution: Add phone_verified field; implement OTP verification

trust_levels.semantic_differences: Identity document validation; no equivalent in V2
trust_levels.runtime_impact: Identity verification workflow needed; admin validation
trust_levels.matching_impact: Higher match confidence for verified users
trust_levels.recommended_resolution: Add identity_verified field; implement document upload + admin validation

trust_levels.semantic_differences: Professional document validation for agents/partners; no equivalent in V2
trust_levels.runtime_impact: Professional document upload + admin review workflow
trust_levels.security_impact: Validated professionals have elevated system trust
trust_levels.recommended_resolution: Add professional_docs_verified field; implement pro document workflow

trust_levels.semantic_differences: Full professional verification (agent/partner); no equivalent in V2
trust_levels.runtime_impact: Professional status gates access to pro features
trust_levels.recommended_resolution: Add professional_verified field; complete verification workflow

trust_levels.semantic_differences: Highest trust level for reference accounts; no equivalent in V2
trust_levels.recommended_resolution: Add reference_account field; manual grant by admin only

badges.semantic_differences: Explicit badge display for phone verification
badges.recommended_resolution: Implement badge system tied to trust levels

badges.semantic_differences: Email verification badge; no email_verified flag in V2

badges.recommended_resolution: Derive from trust level; implement badge display

badges.data_migration_impact: New owner_verified field or derive from documents
badges.recommended_resolution: Add owner_verified field; implement document verification for owners
Add agency_verified to Organization model; implement verification workflow
Derive from professional_verified; add partner-specific badge

badges.semantic_differences: Agent fully onboarded and active badge
badges.recommended_resolution: Add is_active_agent field or derive from onboarding completion

agency_structure.semantic_differences: V2 Organization matches Gold agency concept

agency_structure.legacy_concept: Agency components (responsible + agents + admin + properties + files + validations + trust)
agency_structure.current_concept: Organization has users + properties; no agency-level validations or trust
agency_structure.semantic_differences: V2 has users+properties on Organization but lacks agency-level trust, validations, and admin role
agency_structure.data_migration_impact: Organization model needs trust_level, verified fields
agency_structure.recommended_resolution: Add trust_level, verification fields to Organization model

agency_structure.legacy_concept: Agency creation (name, resp., phone, address, CNI, RCCM, tax ID)
agency_structure.current_concept: Organization creation exists but no RCCM/CNI/tax ID fields
agency_structure.semantic_differences: V2 Organization missing required registration fields for agency creation
agency_structure.data_migration_impact: Add RCCM, tax_id, cni fields to Organization
agency_structure.runtime_impact: Agency creation workflow needs these fields added
agency_structure.recommended_resolution: Add registration fields (rccm, tax_id, cni_document) to Organization model

agency_structure.semantic_differences: Gold defines step-by-step agent onboarding (invitation → account → phone → CNI → validation → active)
agency_structure.recommended_resolution: Implement agent onboarding workflow with state tracking

agency_structure.legacy_concept: Minimum 3 active agents for operational agency
agency_structure.semantic_differences: Gold rule: agency needs min 3 active agents; V2 has no such constraint
agency_structure.data_migration_impact: New validation rule; may need agent count query
agency_structure.runtime_impact: Agency operational status depends on agent count
agency_structure.matching_impact: Agency matching limited if below threshold
agency_structure.recommended_resolution: Add agency operational status rule; check agent count >= 3

agency_structure.semantic_differences: Gold routes leads via agent_zones table; V2 has no routing mechanism
agency_structure.runtime_impact: Lead assignment to agents by zone
agency_structure.recommended_resolution: Implement geographic lead routing with agent_zone assignments

agency_structure.semantic_differences: Gold charges agents per lead; V2 has no lead cost model
agency_structure.runtime_impact: Lead cost deducted from agent credits
agency_structure.recommended_resolution: Implement lead costing with configurable price

agency_structure.semantic_differences: Gold has agent_credits and boost_purchases tables; V2 has no equivalent
agency_structure.data_migration_impact: New credit system fields and tables
agency_structure.recommended_resolution: Implement agent_credits (credits, total_spent, last_recharge) and boost_purchases (boost_type, price, expires_at)

agency_structure.semantic_differences: Gold rates agents 1-5 after each interaction; V2 has no rating mechanism
agency_structure.data_migration_impact: New rating fields on User or Agent model
agency_structure.qualification_impact: Agent rating may affect qualification recommendations
agency_structure.recommended_resolution: Implement agent_rating field (1-5 scale) and post-interaction rating workflow

partner_roles.semantic_differences: Direct match: notary/notaire alias exists in V2
partner_roles.runtime_impact: Partner role has limited system access

partner_roles.semantic_differences: Direct match: surveyor (géomètre) exists as business profile

partner_roles.recommended_resolution: Dual profile mapping; choose based on function

partner_roles.current_concept: official_role="partner" + business_profile ∈ {architect, engineer, technician, contractor, decorator, electrician, plumber, cleaner, mover}
partner_roles.semantic_differences: Gold "Artisan" is a single partner category; V2 has 9+ artisan business profiles with granular specializations
partner_roles.data_migration_impact: Map to role="partner" + most specific business_profile; legacy_data may need mapping rules
partner_roles.recommended_resolution: Granular mapping needed per artisan subtype

partner_roles.semantic_differences: Gold "Expert partenaire" is a generic domain expert; V2 has specific expert profiles
partner_roles.data_migration_impact: Map to role="partner" + business_profile based on expertise domain
partner_roles.recommended_resolution: Map to specific business profile based on domain expertise

role_to_journey.current_concept: Supported via user role + buyer/tenant/land_seeker/investor profiles
role_to_journey.semantic_differences: Journey coverage maintained; business profile adds granularity
role_to_journey.qualification_impact: Qualification for search intent is profile-driven

role_to_journey.current_concept: Supported via operator role + real_estate_agent profile or user role + owner profile
role_to_journey.semantic_differences: Journey coverage maintained; role+profile combination works

role_to_journey.current_concept: Partially supported; matching engine exists but proposal workflows may differ
role_to_journey.semantic_differences: Gold specifically ties matching to demandeur+agent; V2 has broader matching
role_to_journey.runtime_impact: Matching engine uses profiles not roles
role_to_journey.recommended_resolution: Verify matching engine handles demandeur→agent proposal flow

role_to_journey.current_concept: Supported; visit scheduling available for all relevant roles
role_to_journey.semantic_differences: Visit workflows are role-agnostic in V2

role_to_journey.current_concept: Partially supported; negotiation stage exists on Conversation
role_to_journey.semantic_differences: Gold defines role-specific negotiation; V2 has generic negotiation stage
role_to_journey.runtime_impact: Conversation negotiation_stage field exists but may need enrichment
role_to_journey.recommended_resolution: Extend negotiation workflow to be role-aware

role_to_journey.current_concept: Partially supported; no transaction object in V2
role_to_journey.semantic_differences: Gold includes notaire in transaction journey; V2 has no transaction entity
role_to_journey.data_migration_impact: New Transaction model may be needed
role_to_journey.recommended_resolution: Consider Transaction model with role involvement

role_to_journey.current_concept: Limited support; no dedicated post-sale workflows
role_to_journey.semantic_differences: Gold defines post-sale follow-up for agent+owner; V2 has no explicit post-sale flow
Admin role covers assistant, vice_master, master, admin supervision

permission_level_mapping.notes: V2 has no explicit permission model; read is implicit

permission_level_mapping.v2_equivalent: Implicit per role (operator+ can create listings)
permission_level_mapping.notes: Creation rights are hardcoded per feature, not modeled
Edit scope is not formally defined
Approval workflows are entirely absent from V2

trust_level_mapping.notes: Add trust_level field to User model

partner_role_mapping.v2_business_profile: {architect, engineer, technician, contractor, decorator, electrician, plumber, cleaner, mover}

extensions_required.extension: Trust Level system on User model
extensions_required.impact: Security gates, fraud prevention, user confidence
extensions_required.proposed_implementation: Add trust_level INT field + individual verification Boolean fields (phone_verified, identity_verified, professional_docs_verified, professional_verified, reference_account)

extensions_required.impact: Listing validation, agency creation, professional verification
extensions_required.proposed_implementation: Implement ApprovalWorkflow model with approver_role, target_type, target_id, status, reviewed_by, reviewed_at
Add Badge model or derive badges from verification fields; implement badge display API
Add agency_role field (responsible, admin, agent, assistant) to User model scoped by organization_id
Add rccm, tax_id, cni_document fields to Organization model
Create RolePermission model or permission matrix; map 4 levels to official roles
Add onboarding_status field to User; implement state machine (invited → phone_verified → identity_verified → validated → active)
Add agent_rating FLOAT field; implement post-interaction rating update
Add agent_zones table (agent_id, zone); implement routing engine
Add agent_credits table (agent_id, credits, total_spent, last_recharge) and boost_purchases table
Create Transaction model with roles (demandeur, agent, owner, notaire) and status workflow
Add post-sale stages to Project or Conversation models

critical_gaps.impact: Security gates, fraud prevention, user confidence
Listing validation, agency creation, professional verification

fusion_decisions_reference.status: Implemented via business_profile distinction on user role
Implemented via business_profile="owner" on user role
Implemented via business_profile="real_estate_agent" on operator role
Implemented via business_profile="investor" on user role
Partially implemented via operator role; agency_context missing (see XW-RL-011)
